slots: Drive to Lonar from Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar
Deccan plateau approach, crater first glimpse
Leave Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar early for the three-hour drive to Buldhana district. Stop at a highway dhaba for breakfast — the crater rim appears suddenly above the plain.
Impact geology, temple ruins, saline lake views
Walk the rim trail with a local guide who can explain the basalt impact uniqueness. Visit shore temples and photograph the lake’s shifting green hues.
Explore the Hemadpanti Daitya Sudan temple in town, then return to the rim after dark for stars — minimal light pollution.
